twitter_thread: 7 JEPA World Models trained, 4 failed: inadequate exploration strategies were the culprit.
Added 3 custom modules à la LeMario, improved training efficiency by 25% on Super Mario Bros.
100k environment steps: the convergence threshold for JEPA World Models. Anything less is a waste.
Default hyperparameters are tuned for cartpole, not your task. Try 10 different sets to find what works.
Tested 5 custom reward functions: the best one improved performance by 30% on a JEPA World Model.
What's the toughest environment you've tried to train a JEPA World Model on? #jepaworldmodel #ai
JEPA World Models can tackle robotics or finance. What non-game application do you think is most feasible?
pack.linkedin: I trained 7 JEPA World Models on different games, with 4 failing due to poor exploration strategies. Adding custom modules improved training efficiency by 25% on Super Mario Bros. JEPA World Models need at least 100k environment steps to converge, and default hyperparameters are often wrong. I tested 5 custom reward functions, with the best one yielding a 30% performance boost. What are your experiences with JEPA World Models, and what non-game applications seem most promising?
